solum

Marks a test as the only test to run.

Syntax: solum

Category

testing

Related

  • [omitte](/corpus/omitte.html)
  • [futurum](/corpus/futurum.html)

Examples

examples/corpus/solum/solum.fab (canonical · keyword)

Marks a test as the only test to run.

# solum — focused test modifier
#
# GRAMMAR:
#   testModifier :← 'solum'
#
# EXPECTED OUTPUT:
#   No incipit — declaration or test-runner surface only.
#
# BACKEND:
#   declaration-only test modifier (whitelist: solum/solum.fab).
#

proba "focus me" solum {
    adfirma verum
}

Expected output:

Sources
  • ["examples/corpus/solum/solum.fab"]
